    MutableQuad.setCubeFace(Direction side, float fromX, float fromY, float fromZ, float toX, float toY, float toZ)
    Sets the positions of this quad to the face of a cube as it would be defined in a Vanilla block model.
    MutableQuad
    MutableQuad.setCubeFace(Direction side, org.joml.Vector3fc from, org.joml.Vector3fc to)
    Same as MutableQuad.setCubeFace(Direction, float, float, float, float, float, float), but takes the from and to positions from vectors.
    MutableQuad
    MutableQuad.setCubeFaceFromSpriteCoords(Direction side, float left, float bottom, float right, float top, float depth)
    Sets the positions of this quad to form a rectangle on the given block side using a coordinate-system matching the default orientation of sprites in Vanilla block-models.

    MutableQuad.setFullCubeFace(Direction side)
    Same as MutableQuad.setCubeFace(Direction, float, float, float, float, float, float), but uses the full cube.

    Attempts to pick up a fluid in the level and put it into a fluid handler, first from a BucketPickup block (such as fluid sources and waterlogged blocks), or second from a Capabilities.Fluid.BLOCK capability instance.
